reasoning: The control requires protection from malicious code, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security domains. Admission controllers can be used to enforce antivirus scanning on containers before they are admitted to the cluster. Ensuring that Pods have a read-only root filesystem can prevent malicious code from persisting changes. Image vulnerability scanning ensures that images are free from known vulnerabilities before deployment. NetworkPolicies can restrict egress traffic to only allow communication with security services, reducing the risk of malicious code reaching external systems.
title: 3_14_2: 3.14.2 Provide protection from malicious code at designated locations within organizational systems
